name: Hidden Heal
overview:
After the truth is revealed, Farm and Frame(both Ferin) must confront the deep scars within their sisterhood.

Learning to forgive and truly understand each other becomes the most important journey of their hearts. With Gale(Puifai) and Prim (Great) by their side, love becomes the strength that helps them heal.

Hidden Heal - a story of healing that proves "love" not only mends wounds, but makes us stronger
